sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n7317" key="a)na/pthsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνά-πτησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n7317.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">upward flight,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:26p.478M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">26p.478M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
